content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /home/janfr/.claude/skills/gsd-settings

<objective>
Interactive configuration of GSD workflow agents and model profile via multi-question prompt.

Routes to the settings workflow which handles:
- Config existence ensuring
- Current settings reading and parsing
- Interactive 5-question prompt (model, research, plan_check, verifier, branching)
- Config merging and writing
- Confirmation display with quick command references
</objective>

<execution_context>
@$HOME/.claude/gsd-core/workflows/settings.md
</execution_context>

<process>
Execute end-to-end.
</process>
I'll run the GSD settings workflow.

input.command: _GSD_SHIM_NAME="gsd-tools.cjs"; _GSD_RUNTIME_ROOT="${RUNTIME_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; for c in "${_GSD_RUNTIME_ROOT}/gsd-core/bin" "${_GSD_RUNTIME_ROOT}/.claude/gsd-core/bin" "${HOME}/.claude/gsd-core/bin"; do [ -f "$c/$_GSD_SHIM_NAME" ] && echo "FOUND: $c/$_GSD_SHIM_NAME"; done; command -v gsd-tools

node "$HOME/.claude/gsd-core/bin/gsd-tools.cjs" query config-ensure-section && echo "---" && cat .planning/config.json && echo "---" && ls .planning/active-workstream 2>/dev/null || echo "no active-workstream"

content.text: Config is effectively empty (all defaults apply). Let me walk through the settings.

options.label: Adaptive (Recommended)
options.description: Role-based cost optimization: heavy roles use the highest-tier model available, light roles the cheapest.

options.label: Standard tier…
options.description: Choose Quality, Balanced, or Budget — flat tier applied to all agents

options.label: Inherit
options.description: Use current session model for all agents

questions.question: Spawn Plan Researcher? (researches domain before planning)
Spawn Plan Checker? (verifies plans before execution)
